# Templates

Copy these files when adding new documentation.

## Available Templates

- [Workflow Template](workflow_template.md)
- [Troubleshooting Template](troubleshooting_template.md)
- [SOP Template](sop_template.md)
- [Decision Log Template](decision_log_template.md)

## How To Use

1. Copy the closest template into the appropriate section.
2. Rename the file with lowercase words separated by underscores.
3. Add the new page to `mkdocs.yml` under `nav`.
4. Preview the site locally.
5. Open a pull request.
